data.title: JPMorgan: Spire Positioned For Growth With Favorable Missouri Legislation, Rate Case Developments
data.description: JPMorgan upgrades Spire Inc. to Overweight, raises price forecast to $85. Analyst cites regulatory improvements in Missouri and positive factors for increased earnings and growth potential.

data.title: Sunnova Energy (NOVA) Stock Is Volatile: What's Going On?
data.description: Sunnova Energy shares are trading higher by 42.5% during Thursday's session. Earlier this week a report suggested Oaktree Capital Management has been buying up debt in the company.

data.title: Billionaire Stanley Druckenmiller Boosts US Steel Stake By 143%: Is He Betting On Merger?
data.description: Druckenmiller increased stake in United States Steel as company explores merger options. Company's stock up 25% due to Trump's tariffs.

data.title: Smart Money Is Betting Big In LYFT Options
GDS Holdings Analyst Upgrade Highlights Higher AI Demand Driven By DeepSeek, Other Platforms In China
data.description: Raymond James upgrades GDS Holdings to Strong Buy, citing AI demand growth and strategic moves, despite Q4 results causing confusion.
